name: zinput_keyboard_init_device
description: zInput::Keyboard_InitDevice resets keyboard globals, creates/configures/acquires the keyboard device, enables buffered input, and prepares keyboard transition/callback state.
known_limits: Reviewed VC byte comparison from python tools/recoil_vc6_verify.py zinput_keyboard_init_device failed under VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4: 19 unmasked mismatches, 88 relocation-masked bytes, BN size 284, VC object size 288, 5 trailing VC NOPs trimmed; see build/vc6-verify/zinput_keyboard_init_device/verify/46f300_byte_triage.txt.

The reviewed byte drift is limited to the success tail after all DirectInput calls: current VC emits a direct _calloc COFF call where the original calls through the imported calloc pointer, plus related trailing scheduling/padding differences.
